name: @edwardseshoka/google-places
description: Backend Google Places API adapter for Morara.

scripts.prebuild: npm run build --workspace @edwardseshoka/foundation && npm run build --workspace @edwardseshoka/places
scripts.prelint: npm run build --workspace @edwardseshoka/foundation && npm run build --workspace @edwardseshoka/places
scripts.pretypecheck: npm run build --workspace @edwardseshoka/foundation && npm run build --workspace @edwardseshoka/places
